    186 +            "{}",
    187 +            "body-hash",
    188 +            "file-hash",
    189 +            "old-anchor",
    190 +            ".murder/plans/legacy.md",
    191 +            2,
    192 +            "conflict",
    193 +            "stale conflict",
    194 +            None,
    195 +        ),
    196 +    )
    197 +
    198 +    init_db(conn)
    199 +    sql = str(
    200 +        conn.execute(
    201 +            "SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type = 'table' AND name = 'plans'"
    202 +        ).fetchone()["sql"]
    203 +    )
    204 +    row = plan_db.get_plan_row(conn, "legacy")
    205 +    columns = {
    206 +        column["name"] for column in conn.execute("PRAGMA table_info(plans)").fetchall()
    207 +    }
    208 +
    209 +    assert row is not None
    210 +    assert row["sync_state"] == "synced"
    211 +    assert "last_materialized_hash" not in columns
    212 +    assert "conflict_reason" not in columns
    213 +    assert "last_materialized_hash" not in sql
    214 +    assert "conflict_reason" not in sql
    215 +    assert "parse_error" in sql
    216 +    assert "'conflict'" not in sql
    217 +
    218 +    init_db(conn)
    219 +    sql_again = str(
    220 +        conn.execute(
    221 +            "SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type = 'table' AND name = 'plans'"
    222 +        ).fetchone()["sql"]
    223 +    )
    224 +    assert sql_again == sql

• Working (3m 58s • esc to interrupt)


› Find and fix a bug in @filename

  gpt-5.4 high · ~/Documents/code/murder
